name: Bela Lugosi
abstract: Béla Ferenc Dezső Blaskó (Hungarian: [ˈblɒʃkoː ˈbeːlɒ ˈfɛrɛnt͡s ˈdɛʒøː]; October 20, 1882 – August 16, 1956), better known by the stage name Bela Lugosi (, lə-GOH-she; Hungarian: [ˈluɡoʃi]), was a Hungarian–American actor. He was best remembered for portraying Count Dracula in the horror film classic Dracula (1931), Ygor in both Son of F…

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Katz
about_quotes.evidence: He — you know he was not just a gifted drummer, he could have been an actor, comedian, he used to do these — he was obsessed with Bela Lugosi and he used to do all these imitations
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Katz interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 7, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Edison
about_quotes.evidence: some of the big movie stars like Bela Lugosi, he was on morphine, you know.
